scope: Research Table, research-note interaction, and current research/progression parity audit
parity_rule: No new survival mechanics, items, recipes, GUI systems, textures, research progression or fake research. Only original TC4 data/assets and Forge 1.19.2 adapters where 1.7.10 code cannot be used directly.

honest_status.research_note_grid: uses TC4-style radius/hex/anchor adapter, not full original RNG/GUI class parity yet
honest_status.research_progression: original keys/pages/icons are partly mapped and gated; still contains adapter/stub metadata and is not complete TC4 ConfigResearch parity
honest_status.thaumonomicon: uses original GUI assets and research keys, but page layout/icon coordinates still require full ConfigResearch audit

changes: Restored original-style Research Table note-slot interaction without adding modern buttons: right-click slot 1 prepares or opens the note, shift-right-click a solved note completes it.
Left-click slot behavior remains vanilla container movement, so the hotzone no longer blocks normal inventory use.
ResearchNoteScreen aspect palette now uses the same original GuiResearchTable coordinates as the table aspect page: 5 columns, 25 aspects per page, old arrow regions at 27/51,121.
Removed opaque modern square palette backgrounds and the fake plus marker from the research note grid; selection is now an old-gold frame on parchment.
Added Stage563-582 audit guard for table note-slot hotzone, paged note palette, original guiresearchtable2/hex assets, and explicit not-100-percent parity status.
adapters_marked: Forge 1.19.2 right-click note-slot hotzone adapter for original GuiResearchTable flow
Forge 1.19.2 standalone ResearchNoteScreen adapter; original TC4 manipulated research notes inside GuiResearchTable context
not_done_yet: Pixel-perfect original GuiResearchTable class behaviour and every mouse hotzone from 1.7.10
Exact original research-note GUI flow without the standalone adapter screen
Full ConfigResearch parity audit for every key, page, icon, parent, hidden parent, sibling, warp and round/special flags
Removal or quarantine of remaining adapter/stub research metadata after real TC4 entries are fully mapped
Exact ResearchNote RNG/seed behaviour and original note completion UX
